designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style

The design system is built upon the "Modern Pastoral" aesthetic, blending the high-end editorial feel of a luxury lifestyle magazine with the functional cleanliness of a modern grooming facility. The brand personality is expert and local, moving away from generic pet industry tropes in favor of a sophisticated, trustworthy, and premium experience.

The visual direction utilizes a "Refined Minimalism" approach. It prioritizes generous whitespace—referred to here as "Suds"—to evoke a sense of cleanliness and calm. This is punctuated by organic, bubble-like shapes and rhythmic tile patterns that nod to the physical environment of a self-serve wash. The UI should feel curated and intentional, avoiding any cartoonish elements in favor of timeless elegance.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout philosophy follows a **Fixed Grid** model on desktop (12 columns) and a **Fluid Grid** on mobile (4 columns). The defining characteristic is "Editorial Breathing Room"—using significantly larger vertical gaps between sections than standard utility apps.

- **Desktop:** 1200px max-width container with 80px side margins to center the content and provide a boutique feel.
- **Vertical Rhythm:** Sections are separated by `section-gap` to allow the organic motifs space to breathe.
- **Grid Usage:** Content should frequently "break" the grid using off-center alignments or large organic shape overlays to avoid a rigid, corporate feel.

## Elevation & Depth

Depth in this design system is achieved through **Tonal Layers** and **Subtle Glassmorphism** rather than traditional heavy shadows.

- **Surface Levels:** The base is always Suds White. Secondary containers (cards/panels) use a subtle "off-white" or very faint Indigo tint to differentiate.
- **Glassmorphism:** The floating mobile navigation and desktop headers utilize a high-density backdrop blur (20px) with a semi-transparent Suds White fill (85% opacity).
- **Outlines:** Instead of shadows, use 1px "Ghost Borders" in a 10% opacity Deep Indigo to define interactive areas. This maintains the clean, "scrubbed" aesthetic.

## Components

### Buttons & Inputs
- **Primary Action:** Solid Deep Indigo with white Hanken Grotesk text. High padding (16px 32px) and slightly rounded corners.
- **Secondary Action:** Ghost style with a Deep Indigo border and a "Suds" background on hover.
- **Form Inputs:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border in Deep Indigo (2px). Labels sit above in Gold (label-md) to provide a premium feel.

### Cards
- **The "Bubble" Card:** Used for services. Features a white background, the "Ghost Border," and one uniquely oversized rounded corner (2rem). It should include a subtle tile pattern watermark in the corner.

### Navigation
- **Floating Mobile Nav:** A pill-shaped navigation bar that floats 24px from the bottom of the screen. It uses a glassmorphic Suds White background with Deep Indigo icons.
- **Desktop Header:** Minimalist and high-positioned. The logo is centered, with navigation links split to the left and right, set in `label-md`.

### Chips & Tags
- **Status Indicators:** Use secondary colors (Bluegrass for available, Gold for premium/priority) with 10% opacity fills and 100% opacity text for a soft, integrated look.

---
name: Pastoral Grooming System
colors:
  surface: '#fbf8ff'
  surface-dim: '#dbd9e1'
  surface-bright: '#fbf8ff'
  surface-container-lowest: '#ffffff'
  surface-container-low: '#f5f2fb'
  surface-container: '#efecf5'
  surface-container-high: '#eae7ef'
  surface-container-highest: '#e4e1ea'
  on-surface: '#1b1b21'
  on-surface-variant: '#454652'
  inverse-surface: '#303036'
  inverse-on-surface: '#f2eff8'
  outline: '#767683'
  outline-variant: '#c6c5d4'
  surface-tint: '#4c56af'
  primary: '#000666'
  on-primary: '#ffffff'
  primary-container: '#1a237e'
  on-primary-container: '#8690ee'
  inverse-primary: '#bdc2ff'
  secondary: '#446648'
  on-secondary: '#ffffff'
  secondary-container: '#c5edc6'
  on-secondary-container: '#4a6c4e'
  tertiary: '#735c00'
  on-tertiary: '#ffffff'
  tertiary-container: '#cba72f'
  on-tertiary-container: '#4e3d00'
  error: '#ba1a1a'
  on-error: '#ffffff'
  error-container: '#ffdad6'
  on-error-container: '#93000a'
  primary-fixed: '#e0e0ff'
  primary-fixed-dim: '#bdc2ff'
  on-primary-fixed: '#000767'
  on-primary-fixed-variant: '#343d96'
  secondary-fixed: '#c5edc6'
  secondary-fixed-dim: '#aad0ab'
  on-secondary-fixed: '#00210a'
  on-secondary-fixed-variant: '#2c4e32'
  tertiary-fixed: '#ffe088'
  tertiary-fixed-dim: '#e9c349'
  on-tertiary-fixed: '#241a00'
  on-tertiary-fixed-variant: '#574500'
  background: '#fbf8ff'
  on-background: '#1b1b21'
  surface-variant: '#e4e1ea'
typography:
  display-lg:
    fontFamily: Playfair Display
    fontSize: 56px
    fontWeight: '700'
    lineHeight: 64px
    letterSpacing: -0.02em
  headline-lg:
    fontFamily: Playfair Display
    fontSize: 40px
    fontWeight: '700'
    lineHeight: 48px
  headline-lg-mobile:
    fontFamily: Playfair Display
    fontSize: 32px
    fontWeight: '700'
    lineHeight: 40px
  headline-md:
    fontFamily: Playfair Display
    fontSize: 28px
    fontWeight: '600'
    lineHeight: 36px
  body-lg:
    fontFamily: Hanken Grotesk
    fontSize: 18px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: 28px
  body-md:
    fontFamily: Hanken Grotesk
    fontSize: 16px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: 24px
  label-md:
    fontFamily: Hanken Grotesk
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '600'
    lineHeight: 20px
    letterSpacing: 0.05em
rounded:
  sm: 0.25rem
  DEFAULT: 0.5rem
  md: 0.75rem
  lg: 1rem
  xl: 1.5rem
  full: 9999px
spacing:
  unit: 8px
  margin-mobile: 24px
  margin-desktop: 80px
  gutter: 24px
  section-gap: 120px
---

## Brand & Style

The design system is built upon the "Modern Pastoral" aesthetic, blending the high-end editorial feel of a luxury lifestyle magazine with the functional cleanliness of a modern grooming facility. The brand personality is expert and local, moving away from generic pet industry tropes in favor of a sophisticated, trustworthy, and premium experience.

The visual direction utilizes a "Refined Minimalism" approach. It prioritizes generous whitespace—referred to here as "Suds"—to evoke a sense of cleanliness and calm. This is punctuated by organic, bubble-like shapes and rhythmic tile patterns that nod to the physical environment of a self-serve wash. The UI should feel curated and intentional, avoiding any cartoonish elements in favor of timeless elegance.

## Colors

The palette is grounded in "Deep Indigo," providing a sense of authoritative expertise and stability. This is balanced by "Suds White," a cool-toned neutral that acts as the canvas for the entire system.

- **Primary (Deep Indigo):** Used for typography, primary navigation, and high-emphasis components.
- **Secondary (Kentucky Bluegrass):** An earthy, deep green used for success states, natural imagery overlays, and secondary functional buttons.
- **Accent (Pup Gold):** A sophisticated metallic gold used sparingly for highlights, call-to-actions, and premium badges.
- **Neutral (Deep Charcoal):** Reserved for body copy and high-contrast borders to ensure maximum legibility against the Suds White background.

## Typography

This system uses a high-contrast typographic pairing to reinforce the "Pastoral" theme. **Playfair Display** provides an editorial, sophisticated voice for all headings. It should be typeset with tight tracking in larger sizes to feel like a premium publication.

**Hanken Grotesk** serves as the functional workhorse. It is a clean, contemporary sans-serif that ensures high legibility for service menus, instructions, and booking forms. Labels and utility text utilize uppercase styling with increased letter spacing to create a sense of order and professional hierarchy.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout philosophy follows a **Fixed Grid** model on desktop (12 columns) and a **Fluid Grid** on mobile (4 columns). The defining characteristic is "Editorial Breathing Room"—using significantly larger vertical gaps between sections than standard utility apps.

- **Desktop:** 1200px max-width container with 80px side margins to center the content and provide a boutique feel.
- **Vertical Rhythm:** Sections are separated by `section-gap` to allow the organic motifs space to breathe.
- **Grid Usage:** Content should frequently "break" the grid using off-center alignments or large organic shape overlays to avoid a rigid, corporate feel.

## Elevation & Depth

Depth in this design system is achieved through **Tonal Layers** and **Subtle Glassmorphism** rather than traditional heavy shadows.

- **Surface Levels:** The base is always Suds White. Secondary containers (cards/panels) use a subtle "off-white" or very faint Indigo tint to differentiate.
- **Glassmorphism:** The floating mobile navigation and desktop headers utilize a high-density backdrop blur (20px) with a semi-transparent Suds White fill (85% opacity).
- **Outlines:** Instead of shadows, use 1px "Ghost Borders" in a 10% opacity Deep Indigo to define interactive areas. This maintains the clean, "scrubbed" aesthetic.

## Shapes

The shape language is the core motif of the system. It avoids rigid squares in favor of "Bubble Geometry."

- **Organic Containers:** Main image containers and featured cards should use asymmetrical border-radii (e.g., top-left: 80px, top-right: 40px, bottom-right: 120px, bottom-left: 40px) to mimic soap bubbles or stones.
- **Standard Elements:** Interactive components like buttons and inputs use a consistent 0.5rem (rounded) corner to maintain a friendly, approachable feel.
- **Tile Patterns:** A subtle 2x2 grid pattern (reminiscent of subway tiles) is used as a background texture in specific sections to ground the pastoral theme in a grooming context.

## Components

### Buttons & Inputs
- **Primary Action:** Solid Deep Indigo with white Hanken Grotesk text. High padding (16px 32px) and slightly rounded corners.
- **Secondary Action:** Ghost style with a Deep Indigo border and a "Suds" background on hover.
- **Form Inputs:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border in Deep Indigo (2px). Labels sit above in Gold (label-md) to provide a premium feel.

### Cards
- **The "Bubble" Card:** Used for services. Features a white background, the "Ghost Border," and one uniquely oversized rounded corner (2rem). It should include a subtle tile pattern watermark in the corner.

### Navigation
- **Floating Mobile Nav:** A pill-shaped navigation bar that floats 24px from the bottom of the screen. It uses a glassmorphic Suds White background with Deep Indigo icons.
- **Desktop Header:** Minimalist and high-positioned. The logo is centered, with navigation links split to the left and right, set in `label-md`.

### Chips & Tags
- **Status Indicators:** Use secondary colors (Bluegrass for available, Gold for premium/priority) with 10% opacity fills and 100% opacity text for a soft, integrated look.

screens.prompt: A cozy, inviting interior of a local pet grooming shop in Kentucky. Modern farmhouse style, clean, with warm wood accents and comfortable seating. No people, just the atmosphere. High quality architectural photography.
screens.title: A cozy, inviting interior of a local pet grooming shop in Kentucky. Modern farmhouse style, clean, with warm wood accents and comfortable seating. No people, just the atmosphere. High quality architectural photography.

screens.name: projects/17884182826800129375/screens/24098cc3da7d42c9a66b8df057a798af
screens.prompt:
Build the complete DESKTOP landing page for Scrub-A-Pup Self-Serve Laundromutt. Design Strategy: - Visual Motif: Use 'Kentucky Bluegrass' as a subtle accent and 'Deep Indigo' as the anchor. Editorial whitespace and high-end typography (Playfair Display for headings). - Section Order & Layout: 1. Header: sticky, with primary action (859) 353-5033. 2. Hero: Overlapping layout featuring {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_5}} (Golden Retriever in wash station). Large, elegant typography. 3. Credibility: 'Kentucky Grown' values. Use a non-standard grid, maybe a vertical timeline or staggered layout. 4. Services: Interactive cards for 'Self-Serve Suds', 'Professional Grooming', and 'A La Carte'. Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_3}} (tools) as a secondary visual. 5. About: 'The Laundromutt Story'. Focus on community and local charm. Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}} (interior) as a background or side element. 6. Visit: Section titled 'Locate the Laundromutt'. Must include: 2019 Catalpa Loop, Richmond, KY 40475 and EXACTLY `
`. 7. Contact: Form with 'Get in Touch' copy. Include thelaundromutt22@gmail.com. 8. Footer: Minimalist, clean. Technical Requirements: - Responsive design. - Form validation UI. - No placeholder text (no Lorem Ipsum). - Use CSS custom properties for the color palette.

  md: 0.75rem
  lg: 1rem
  xl: 1.5rem
  full: 9999px
spacing:
  unit: 8px
  margin-mobile: 24px
  margin-desktop: 80px
  gutter: 24px
  section-gap: 120px
---

## Brand & Style

The design system is built upon the "Modern Pastoral" aesthetic, blending the high-end editorial feel of a luxury lifestyle magazine with the functional cleanliness of a modern grooming facility. The brand personality is expert and local, moving away from generic pet industry tropes in favor of a sophisticated, trustworthy, and premium experience.

The visual direction utilizes a "Refined Minimalism" approach. It prioritizes generous whitespace—referred to here as "Suds"—to evoke a sense of cleanliness and calm. This is punctuated by organic, bubble-like shapes and rhythmic tile patterns that nod to the physical environment of a self-serve wash. The UI should feel curated and intentional, avoiding any cartoonish elements in favor of timeless elegance.

## Colors

The palette is grounded in "Deep Indigo," providing a sense of authoritative expertise and stability. This is balanced by "Suds White," a cool-toned neutral that acts as the canvas for the entire system.

- **Primary (Deep Indigo):** Used for typography, primary navigation, and high-emphasis components.
- **Secondary (Kentucky Bluegrass):** An earthy, deep green used for success states, natural imagery overlays, and secondary functional buttons.
- **Accent (Pup Gold):** A sophisticated metallic gold used sparingly for highlights, call-to-actions, and premium badges.
- **Neutral (Deep Charcoal):** Reserved for body copy and high-contrast borders to ensure maximum legibility against the Suds White background.

## Typography

This system uses a high-contrast typographic pairing to reinforce the "Pastoral" theme. **Playfair Display** provides an editorial, sophisticated voice for all headings. It should be typeset with tight tracking in larger sizes to feel like a premium publication.

**Hanken Grotesk** serves as the functional workhorse. It is a clean, contemporary sans-serif that ensures high legibility for service menus, instructions, and booking forms. Labels and utility text utilize uppercase styling with increased letter spacing to create a sense of order and professional hierarchy.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout philosophy follows a **Fixed Grid** model on desktop (12 columns) and a **Fluid Grid** on mobile (4 columns). The defining characteristic is "Editorial Breathing Room"—using significantly larger vertical gaps between sections than standard utility apps.

- **Desktop:** 1200px max-width container with 80px side margins to center the content and provide a boutique feel.
- **Vertical Rhythm:** Sections are separated by `section-gap` to allow the organic motifs space to breathe.
- **Grid Usage:** Content should frequently "break" the grid using off-center alignments or large organic shape overlays to avoid a rigid, corporate feel.

## Elevation & Depth

Depth in this design system is achieved through **Tonal Layers** and **Subtle Glassmorphism** rather than traditional heavy shadows.

- **Surface Levels:** The base is always Suds White. Secondary containers (cards/panels) use a subtle "off-white" or very faint Indigo tint to differentiate.
- **Glassmorphism:** The floating mobile navigation and desktop headers utilize a high-density backdrop blur (20px) with a semi-transparent Suds White fill (85% opacity).
- **Outlines:** Instead of shadows, use 1px "Ghost Borders" in a 10% opacity Deep Indigo to define interactive areas. This maintains the clean, "scrubbed" aesthetic.

## Shapes

The shape language is the core motif of the system. It avoids rigid squares in favor of "Bubble Geometry."

- **Organic Containers:** Main image containers and featured cards should use asymmetrical border-radii (e.g., top-left: 80px, top-right: 40px, bottom-right: 120px, bottom-left: 40px) to mimic soap bubbles or stones.
- **Standard Elements:** Interactive components like buttons and inputs use a consistent 0.5rem (rounded) corner to maintain a friendly, approachable feel.
- **Tile Patterns:** A subtle 2x2 grid pattern (reminiscent of subway tiles) is used as a background texture in specific sections to ground the pastoral theme in a grooming context.

## Components

### Buttons & Inputs
- **Primary Action:** Solid Deep Indigo with white Hanken Grotesk text. High padding (16px 32px) and slightly rounded corners.
- **Secondary Action:** Ghost style with a Deep Indigo border and a "Suds" background on hover.
- **Form Inputs:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border in Deep Indigo (2px). Labels sit above in Gold (label-md) to provide a premium feel.

### Cards
- **The "Bubble" Card:** Used for services. Features a white background, the "Ghost Border," and one uniquely oversized rounded corner (2rem). It should include a subtle tile pattern watermark in the corner.

### Navigation
- **Floating Mobile Nav:** A pill-shaped navigation bar that floats 24px from the bottom of the screen. It uses a glassmorphic Suds White background with Deep Indigo icons.
- **Desktop Header:** Minimalist and high-positioned. The logo is centered, with navigation links split to the left and right, set in `label-md`.

### Chips & Tags
- **Status Indicators:** Use secondary colors (Bluegrass for available, Gold for premium/priority) with 10% opacity fills and 100% opacity text for a soft, integrated look.

screens.title: Scrub-A-Pup | Premium Laundromutt & Grooming

text:
I've designed a bespoke, editorial-grade homepage for **Scrub-A-Pup Self-Serve Laundromutt** that captures their unique "Laundromutt" personality with a premium Kentucky touch.

### Design Highlights:
- **Visual Identity**: I established a "Modern Pastoral" theme using a sophisticated palette of **Deep Indigo**, **Suds White**, and **Kentucky Bluegrass** accents. This moves away from typical "pet store" aesthetics toward a more high-end, boutique feel.
- **Editorial Layout**: The homepage features an intentional, staggered layout with generous whitespace. I've avoided standard 50/50 splits in favor of overlapping elements and a custom grid that feels designed, not assembled.
- **Imagery & Motifs**: High-fidelity lifestyle imagery—including a happy Golden Retriever in a modern wash station and close-ups of professional tools—reinforces the premium quality of the services.
- **Local Credibility**: A dedicated "Kentucky Grown" section highlights the business's community roots in Richmond, KY, using a staggered timeline motif.
- **Functionality**: The site includes a sticky navigation with a direct call-to-action, interactive service cards, a custom-styled contact form, and a dedicated visit section with the requested map slot.

The design is fully responsive and uses semantic HTML/CSS, ensuring it looks as good on a mobile device as it does on a desktop.

How does this visual direction feel for the brand? We can refine the color weights or adjust specific section layouts if you'd like to explore more!

suggestion: Make it feel even more premium with dark mode explorations
Add more playful "suds" motifs to the background sections
Let's see how the mobile navigation feels
